response.justification: Aisha has extensive full-stack experience with a strong background in TypeScript, Node.js, and React, matching the primary stack requirements. Her work in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling aligns well with emerging technologies mentioned in the job description. While her exposure to Nest.js is limited, her adaptability across stacks (e.g., Kotlin/Java) and cloud platforms (AWS, Kubernetes) compensates. Her leadership in open-source projects and technical workshops demonstrates deep technical expertise and collaboration skills.
strengths: Deep full-stack expertise with TypeScript, Node.js, and React, covering both frontend and backend development
Experience with AI-agent infrastructure and cloud platforms (AWS, Kubernetes), aligning with modern tooling trends
Strong track record of building scalable solutions and contributing to open-source projects, showcasing architectural and technical depth
concerns: Limited direct experience with Nest.js, a required primary stack component, though she has worked with similar backend frameworks
Primary experience with MongoDB (NoSQL) may require adaptation to relational databases (PostgreSQL/MySQL) mentioned in the job description
Recent role at re:cinq is currently active, which may limit immediate availability for a new position
